capability: A localized, static-first collection of articles: a router/index page that lists posts, plus N co-located post folders. One archetype, three presets via the `format` parameter — news (NewsArticle, Person author), blog (BlogPosting, Organization author), document (TechArticle, Person author). Each thawed group inherits the full page standard: SEO metadata, OpenGraph/Twitter, JSON-LD (Article + BreadcrumbList + FAQPage), breadcrumbs, table of contents, FAQ, author byline. Posts are auto-discovered by parser-fs (no registry, no [slug]).
doesNotServe: course with lessons and graded tests / quizzes / progress tracking
forms that collect and persist visitor input
refusalHint: This frozen archetype builds a static article collection (news / blog / docs). It does NOT build carts, checkout, graded courses, or interactive app screens — those are different archetypes that do not exist yet. Offer to open a new step (or a propose-new-agent-skill-or-mcp draft) to author the needed archetype, instead of forcing this one.

tab.description: URL + folder slug of the collection, kebab-case, e.g. 'news', 'blog', 'documentation'. Becomes app/[lang]/<tab>/.

format.description: Preset: structured-data type + author kind. news=NewsArticle/Person, blog=BlogPosting/Organization, document=TechArticle/Person.

languages.description: BCP-47 language codes the app is configured for (e.g. ['en','ru']). 'en' is always the base. One UI-chrome file per language is generated; the translated label fills it, the rest inherits the en base.

labels.description: The collection's display name translated per language, e.g. { en: 'News', ru: 'Новости' }. The single word/phrase is translated by the calling model (one word — cheap, not code generation). 'en' is required.

samples.description: How many placeholder posts to thaw. Each inherits the ideal post architecture but uses Lorem-ipsum body + a placeholder hero/og image. 0 = router only.

layers.name: engine
layers.description: Shared, decoupled content engine (lib/content, components/content-page, lib/brand, lib/author, lib/seo/alternates). Belongs to NO single tab — installed once into the slot. Idempotent: skipped entirely when the slot already has lib/content. Brand/domain come from NEXT_PUBLIC_* env, so no per-deploy tokenization.

layers.name: tab
layers.description: The parameterized collection itself: app/[lang]/{{TAB}}/ router + _lib + _data + N post folders. Refuses to overwrite an existing tab folder without --force. Path + content tokens are substituted at thaw time.

tokens.{{TAB}}: tab slug (kebab, lowercase) — paths, URLs, parser-fs COLLECTIONS dir
tokens.{{TAB_PASCAL}}: PascalCase of tab — component + type names (e.g. News -> NewsIndex, NewsData)
tokens.{{TAB_CAMEL}}: camelCase of tab — function names (e.g. newsPost, newsList, getNewsUi)
tokens.{{FORMAT}}: news | blog | document — createContentPost format + JSON-LD preset
tokens.{{LABEL}}: per-language display label, substituted inside each generated _data/<lang>.ts
tokens.{{SAMPLE_DATE}}: ISO date for the placeholder post

postThaw.registerCollection: Add one line to lib/parser-fs.mjs COLLECTIONS: { dir: 'app/[lang]/{{TAB}}', type: '{{TAB_PASCAL}}Data', typeModule: './_lib/post' } (idempotent — skip if the dir is already registered).
postThaw.sitemap: Append '/{{TAB}}' to app/sitemap.ts manual path list (idempotent).
postThaw.regenerateLists: Run `npm run gen:lists` (parser-fs) so _list.generated.ts picks up the placeholder posts.
postThaw.placeholderImage: Each post's heroImage/ogImage points at a shipped placeholder under /placeholders/content-collection.svg (the engine layer ships it).

notes: Self-sufficient frozen PROJECT: thawing into a bare starter installs the engine AND the tab, so the content capability appears even where it did not exist before (FNS cockpit). The thaw is pure file copy + token substitution — zero LLM code generation; any model (Hermes / Codex / Claude / Gemini / Qwen / Kimi) produces an identical result. Distilled 1:1 from the FES content engine (decoupled from FES-only sponsorship / i18n-provider / hardcoded domain). Authoritative reference: /code/next-step/146-frozen-archetypes-thaw-without-codegen.next-step.md.
